features: 【MATERIAL】- Design with 100% Japan Synthetic Heat-Resisting Fiber. Large Messy Hair Bun blends naturally with your own hair which wears comfortably and looks like real hair. Weight: 55 grams.

【ADJUSTABLE SIZE】- Hair bun extension features an elastic rubber band with good elasticity and long life for use. Our messy hair bun can roll two turns around in your hair ponytail bun to Stronger it.
【EASY TO USE]- Messy Wavy Hair bun extension can change your look in seconds, save your time and magnify your beauty which can bring you an elegant decent look just in seconds.

【SUITABLE OCCASIONS】- Messy Wavy bun scrunchies are perfect for adding volume and fullness to a bun or a ponytail, very comfortable and easy to use which is stylish for various occasions, such as Parties, Dance, Shopping, Yoga, Wedding, Daily use and any other.
【SERVICE】 - We sincerely promise to provide you with 7x24 customer service. If you have any questions please contact us, we will wholeheartedly solve them for you.
